post.subject: Anything better on?
post.body:
I mean seriously. You selfish fucking bastard! I dont want to watch fucking swimming all fucking afternoon and i dont think everyone else does either. Get a fucking life. Get off your fucking ass and be sociable! AAAHHHHHHHHHHHH *Expresses anger loudly*


On a Lighter note - i want an iPod. Those things ROCK! Was playin with Helens today and i loved it!
